title: USDC issuer Circle wins final approval for US national trust bank charter
summary: USDC issuer Circle wins final approval for US national trust bank charter
briefing: Circle announces it received final OCC approval for a national trust bank that will initially serve the company and affiliates, with possible future custody services for institutional clients.

title: Japanese lender launches Bitcoin-backed loans of up to $6.2M
summary: Japanese lender launches Bitcoin-backed loans of up to $6.2M
briefing: CRYL is offering Bitcoin-backed loans to individuals and businesses as Japanese firms explore broader uses for BTC in lending and credit markets.

title: TeraWulf eyes $3.5B debt raise for Anthropic-linked data center: Report
summary: TeraWulf eyes $3.5B debt raise for Anthropic-linked data center: Report
briefing: Bitcoin miner TeraWulf is reportedly seeking $3.5 billion in debt financing led by Morgan Stanley for its Kentucky data center campus leased by AI company Anthropic.

title: Metaplanet explores Bitcoin-backed digital credit with JPYC in Japan
summary: Metaplanet explores Bitcoin-backed digital credit with JPYC in Japan
briefing: Metaplanet said it is studying Bitcoin-backed digital credit products in Japan with JPYC and Progmat, but no product has been launched.

title: Bitcoin returns to $64.3K with new three-week BTC price highs imminent
summary: Bitcoin returns to $64.3K with new three-week BTC price highs imminent
briefing: Bitcoin bulls faced "crucial resistance" at $65,000 next as BTC price action diverged from oil and US dollar strength.

title: EU parliament passes ‘chat control,’ allowing private chat scans until 2028
summary: EU parliament passes ‘chat control,’ allowing private chat scans until 2028
briefing: EU lawmakers have again allowed tech firms to scan chats for abuse material, but exempted end-to-end encrypted messages.

title: Robinhood Chain sees over $70M in ETH bridged during first week
summary: Robinhood Chain sees over $70M in ETH bridged during first week
briefing: Robinhood’s choice to use Ethereum further solidifies its position as the “ultimate settlement layer and liquidity foundation for tokenized assets,” said HashKey Group’s Tim Sun.

title: Zcash targets July 28 launch for Ironwood network upgrade
summary: Zcash targets July 28 launch for Ironwood network upgrade
briefing: Zcash’s next upgrade will replace the once-compromised Orchard pool and may offer clues about whether counterfeit tokens were created via a recent bug.

title: Jailed Fraudster Charged With Moving $290K in Forfeited Crypto From Prison
summary: Jailed Fraudster Charged With Moving $290K in Forfeited Crypto From Prison
briefing: A convicted launderer serving time for a $5 million scheme allegedly moved crypto that a court had ordered him to forfeit.

title: North Carolina Bill Recognizes CFTC's ‘Federal Regulatory Authority’ Over Prediction Markets
summary: North Carolina Bill Recognizes CFTC's ‘Federal Regulatory Authority’ Over Prediction Markets
briefing: The state's budget law leaves oversight of Kalshi and Polymarket to the CFTC and taxes them at 6%, far below what other states are pursuing.

title: AI Agents Could Be Turned Into Botnets Through Hallucinations, Researchers Warn
summary: AI Agents Could Be Turned Into Botnets Through Hallucinations, Researchers Warn
briefing: Researchers warn AI agents could be tricked into downloading malicious code by exploiting the same hallucinations that cause chatbots to make mistakes.

title: Avalanche Treasury Firm AVAX One Reclaims Nasdaq Compliance After Reverse Stock Split
summary: Avalanche Treasury Firm AVAX One Reclaims Nasdaq Compliance After Reverse Stock Split
briefing: AVAX One, which stockpiles the native token of the Avalanche crypto network, is back in Nasdaq's good graces after a reverse stock split.

title: Perplexity Fine-Tuned a Chinese AI Model to Match Claude Opus 4.8 at One-Third the Cost
summary: Perplexity Fine-Tuned a Chinese AI Model to Match Claude Opus 4.8 at One-Third the Cost
briefing: The company's post-trained GLM 5.2 preview pairs a cheaper open-source base with a frontier advisor—and it's already live in production.

title: Anthropic AI Oversight Board Adds Ben Bernanke, Who Oversaw 2008 Financial Crisis at Fed
summary: Anthropic AI Oversight Board Adds Ben Bernanke, Who Oversaw 2008 Financial Crisis at Fed
briefing: Former Fed Chair Ben Bernanke will have the power to appoint Anthropic board members as part of company's Long-Term Benefit Trust.

title: Ethereum Foundation Turns AI Loose on ETH Network to Find Bugs Before Hackers Do
summary: Ethereum Foundation Turns AI Loose on ETH Network to Find Bugs Before Hackers Do
briefing: Ethereum researchers are using AI agents to hunt for vulnerabilities, shifting security work from finding bugs to proving which ones are real.

title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 Sol: Here’s How It Stacks Up Against Other AI Models
summary: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 Sol: Here’s How It Stacks Up Against Other AI Models
briefing: OpenAI's new flagship model is out, after spending two weeks locked behind a government-approved preview. It lands the same week Fable 5 leaves Anthropic's subscription plans.
